---
title: "AI data reports - quarto version"
format: html
bibliography: "../cite/bibliography.bib"
csl: "../cite/citestyle.csl"
prefer-html: true
---

This is a test of the cross-refs in this doc (@tbl-stations-allocated). And here is a test for figure cross-referencing. This is a test of the citations [@rugolo_examination_2020]. Here is a citation of the map figure ( @fig-area-map ).

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, error = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(magrittr)

# Load tables
load(file = "C:/Users/margaret.siple/Work/Data reports/goa-ai-data-reports/output/2022-11-03/tables/report_tables.rdata")

# Load figures
img1_path <- here::here("img/AleutiansMap.png")
  img1 <- png::readPNG(img1_path)
  
# where are figs stored?
dir_in_figures <- "C:/Users/margaret.siple/Work/Data reports/goa-ai-data-reports/output/2022-11-07/figures/"

load(file = paste0(
    dir_in_figures,"cpue_bubbles.rdata")) # object: list_cpue_bubbles
load(file = paste0(
    dir_in_figures,"joy_length.rdata")) # object: list_joy_length
load(file = paste0(
    dir_in_figures,"biomass_ts.rdata")) # object: list_biomass_ts
```


<!-- Tables -->

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{r echo=FALSE}
#| label: tbl-stations-allocated
#| tbl-cap: 'Stations allocated and sampled this year.'
#gt::gt(list_tables[[1]])
kableExtra::kable(list_tables[[1]]) %>% kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{r echo=FALSE}
#| label: tbl-sample-sizes
#| tbl-cap: 'Target numbers of length samples for each managed species.'
gt::gt(list_tables[[2]])
```

{{< pagebreak >}}

<!-- Figures -->
![Map of the Aleutian Islands 2018 bottom trawl survey area indicating survey districts (WAI = Western Aleutian Islands, CAI = Central Aleutian Islands, EAI = Eastern Aleutian Islands, and SBS = Southern Bering Sea), isobaths from 100–500 m and stations sampled (black dots).](../img/AleutiansMap.png){#fig-area-map}
